summary_en: 9.0M shares (3.16% S/O) – limit ¥27.0B – open-market purchases on TSE – Nov 17, 2025 to Jan 31, 2027. Prior program (Nov 14, 2025 & Mar 11, 2026 board resolutions): 6.0M shares (2.11% S/O), ¥15.0B, Sep 30, 2026 expiry. By Apr 30, 2026: 926k shares acquired for ¥3.999B. Purpose: shareholder return reinforcement and capital efficiency.
title_en: Notice regarding Expansion of Treasury Stock Acquisition Frame and Extension of Acquisition Period
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, Kyoto Financial Group's board approved an expansion and extension of its treasury stock acquisition program. The new authorization raises the share count limit from 6.0M to 9.0M shares (3.16% of outstanding shares, excluding treasury stock) and increases the yen ceiling from ¥15.0B to ¥27.0B. The execution window is extended from Sep 30, 2026 to Jan 31, 2027, with purchases to be made on the Tokyo Stock Exchange via open-market transactions beginning Nov 17, 2025. The company cites its shareholder return policy and pursuit of capital efficiency as the rationale. As of Apr 30, 2026, the company had acquired 926k shares for ¥3.999B under the prior board resolutions (Nov 14, 2025 and Mar 11, 2026). Treasury stock holdings at Mar 31, 2026 were 17.3M shares.
